summary: Focused re-test of mystical aura mount/unmount fix. Guided flow: aura present immediately after result card, and fully removed from DOM after ~4s. Classic flow: no aura present. Both scenarios PASS.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Aura unmount fix verified. mystical-aura element mounts immediately after guided seal + result card appears, then is fully removed from DOM within 4.2s (querySelector count == 0). Classic (non-guided) deal at ZIP 10001 never renders mystical-aura. Viewport 1440x900, ZIP 10001, live Google Places.
rca of the issue: N/A - previously-reported bug (aura remained mounted at opacity 0) is fixed via single-keyed AnimatePresence child in /app/frontend/src/pages/Home.jsx.
